acceptance_criteria.text: Dialog builder creates a document agent from natural language and persists setup metadata.
Datahub-lite catalog includes connected text and uploaded file sources with ready state.
Feedback creates a new version with diff, rollback, and activation support.
Generic agents do not externally dispatch and require final approval.
Production smoke fixtures are cleaned and service remains healthy.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: ssh root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc "cd /app && env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 SMOKE_PASSWORD=<password> python -"' < scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_generic_boundaries.py
known_gaps: GigaChat SSL warning remains visible in production logs and should stay tracked under the existing explicit workaround policy.
